name: Community Choice
description_short: Community Choice is a federally insured credit union serving Michigan members with digital banking, home equity products, and personalized financial advisory services.
description_long:
Community Choice Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving Michigan residents. The credit union is federally insured and operates as a traditional NCUA-insured credit union with a focus on simplified, accessible banking. The organization celebrated its 90th annual meeting in 2026, indicating long-standing stability and community presence.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of member services including checking and savings accounts, personal loans, auto loans, and home equity products. Their primary lending product is FlexChoice, a home equity line of credit with introductory rates as low as 4.99% APR for 5 months. Members also have access to digital banking tools like e-Banking with savings goal tracking features called "Targets," mobile apps rated 4.6 stars, and the Choice Map financial wellness planning service. The credit union provides 30,000+ surcharge-free ATM access nationwide and maintains multiple member centers across Michigan.

Community Choice distinguishes itself through community engagement and specialized lending. The credit union has served cannabis businesses since 2020, demonstrating willingness to work with underserved industries. In 2025, they recorded 13,359 volunteer service hours and received a Mastercard Doing Well by Doing Good Award. Members report high satisfaction (4.8-star Google rating, 92% say banking is easy) and appreciate the combination of convenient digital tools with personalized service from loan officers and advisors.

The credit union is best suited for Michigan residents seeking relationship-based banking with modern digital convenience. The primary limitation is geographic restriction to Michigan membership, and the website does not clearly detail membership eligibility criteria, account minimums, or comprehensive fee schedules. While rates and services are competitive, specific comparison data against other credit unions is not provided on their site.
pros: 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs nationwide for member convenience
FlexChoice home equity line of credit with intro rates as low as 4.99% APR for 5 months
Choice Map financial wellness planning with personal advisors at no advertised cost
Mobile app rated 4.6 stars with e-Banking features including savings goal tracking (Targets)
92% of members report banking is easy; 4.8-star Google rating across member reviews
Serves underserved markets including cannabis businesses since 2020
Multiple member centers across Michigan with both digital and in-person service options
cons: Membership appears restricted to Michigan residents only, limiting national accessibility
Website does not clearly disclose account minimums, monthly fees, or comprehensive fee schedule
Limited information about personal loan amounts, rates, and eligibility criteria
No clear details on business banking services or eligibility despite mentioning cannabis business lending
Specific APR ranges for auto loans and other products not provided on homepage
best_for: Michigan residents seeking relationship-based credit union banking with modern digital tools
Homeowners looking for flexible home equity access with potential rate locks
Cannabis industry businesses requiring specialized banking services
Members wanting personalized financial planning combined with self-service digital access
diagnosis: Community Choice Credit Union is best for Michigan residents seeking a member-owned financial institution combining modern digital banking convenience with personalized service and community commitment. Primary caveat: membership appears geographically restricted to Michigan, and the website lacks detailed disclosures on fees, account minimums, and specific loan terms needed for comprehensive comparison.
services: Checking and savings accounts with low fees
Personal loans (specific amounts not detailed on website)
FlexChoice home equity line of credit with fixed-rate options
e-Banking with Targets savings goal tracking
Choice Map financial wellness planning with personal advisors
meta_description: Community Choice — NCUA-insured credit union in Farmington Hill, MI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
